languages.text: "Это снова был темный апостол. Он подтвердил то, на что намекал раньше: Теодора поддерживала с ним связь и пользовалась дарами Хаоса".

traits.locale_text: "Это снова был Темный апостол. Он подтвердил то, на что намекал раньше: Теодора поддерживала с ним связь и пользовалась его дарами".
"Это снова был темный апостол. Он подтвердил то, на что намекал раньше: Теодора поддерживала с ним связь и пользовалась дарами Хаоса".

languages.text: "It was the Dark Apostle again. He confirmed what he had been hinting at before — Theodora was in contact with him and availed herself of the gifts of Chaos."
languages.original_text: "Это снова был темный апостол. Он подтвердил то, на что намекал раньше: Теодора поддерживала с ним связь и пользовалась дарами Хаоса".

traits.locale_text: "Is was the Dark Apostle again. He confirmed what he had been hinting at before: Theodora maintained ties with him and used boons granted by Chaos."
"Is was the Dark Apostle again. He confirmed what he had been hinting at before: Theodora maintained ties with him and used boons granted by Chaos."

"It was the Dark Apostle again. He confirmed what he had been hinting at before — Theodora was in contact with him and availed herself of the gifts of Chaos."

languages.text: "Es war wieder der dunkle Apostel. Er bestätigte, was er zuvor angedeutet hatte — Theodora stand in Kontakt mit ihm und bediente sich der Gaben des Chaos."
languages.original_text: "It was the Dark Apostle again. He confirmed what he had been hinting at before — Theodora was in contact with him and availed herself of the gifts of Chaos."

traits.locale_text: "Es war wieder der dunkle Apostel. Er bestätigte, was er zuvor angedeutet hatte — Theodora stand in Kontakt mit ihm und bediente sich der Gaben des Chaos."

languages.text: "C'était encore l'apôtre des ténèbres. Il a confirmé ce qu'il avait laissé entendre auparavant : Théodora était en contact avec lui et a profité des dons du Chaos."
languages.original_text: "It was the Dark Apostle again. He confirmed what he had been hinting at before — Theodora was in contact with him and availed herself of the gifts of Chaos."

traits.locale_text: "C'était encore l'apôtre des ténèbres. Il a confirmé ce qu'il avait laissé entendre auparavant : Théodora était en contact avec lui et a profité des dons du Chaos."

languages.text: "Era el Apóstol Oscuro de nuevo. Confirmó lo que había insinuado antes: Theodora estaba en contacto con él y se valía de los dones del Caos".
languages.original_text: "It was the Dark Apostle again. He confirmed what he had been hinting at before — Theodora was in contact with him and availed herself of the gifts of Chaos."

traits.locale_text: "Era el Apóstol Oscuro de nuevo. Confirmó lo que había insinuado antes: Theodora estaba en contacto con él y se valía de los dones del Caos".

languages.text: "Arayan yine Karanlık Havari'ydi. Daha önce ima ettiği şeyi doğruladı — Theodora onunla temas halindeydi ve Kaos'un armağanlarından yararlanıyordu."
languages.original_text: "It was the Dark Apostle again. He confirmed what he had been hinting at before — Theodora was in contact with him and availed herself of the gifts of Chaos."

traits.locale_text: "Arayan yine Karanlık Havari'ydi. Daha önce ima ettiği şeyi doğruladı — Theodora onunla temas halindeydi ve Kaos'un armağanlarından yararlanıyordu."
